title: Expropriation powers given by Congress may be exercised
doc_html:
§857.  Expropriation powers given by Congress may be exercised

Every parish may exercise, in this and in any other state, such powers of expropriation or eminent domain as are conferred upon it by any act of Congress.
doc_text:
§857.  Expropriation powers given by Congress may be exercised
Every parish may exercise, in this and in any other state, such powers of expropriation or eminent domain as are conferred upon it by any act of Congress.
